untranslatable_reason: Signal requires calendar-based logic (4 days before month-end) which cannot be expressed using technical indicators from the allowed list. The exact entry timing is date-dependent, not price/indicator-dependent. No allowed indicator can directly reference calendar days or month positions.
translation_notes: The core signal intent is to buy near month-end to capture end-of-month buying pressure. This temporal requirement is incompatible with the technical indicator-based rule engine. A price-based proxy (close > sma_20) is provided as a basic uptrend confirmation, but this does not capture the calendar-specific timing that is central to the signal's hypothesis.
